name: proc_creation_win_forfiles_child_process_masquerading
raw_query: any where ((process.parent.command_line like~ ("*.exe", "*.exe\"")) and process.executable:"*\\cmd.exe" and process.command_line:"/c echo \"*") and (not ((process.parent.executable like~ ("*:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "*:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*")) and process.parent.executable:"*\\forfiles.exe" and (process.executable like~ ("*:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "*:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\cmd.exe"))
